reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Clean bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdTR5WUd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos a descanzar, tiene para desayunar y gran variedad en art. De kiosco, baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to rest; they have breakfast and a wide variety of kiosk items, and the bathrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtNl9UN19BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios y con olor o orines. Había jabón y toalla de papel.
Sin carga de puntos de serviclub ni app de YPF

(Translated by Google)
Bathrooms were dirty and smelled like urine. There was no soap or paper towel.
No Serviclub points or YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMDYtWFpREAE

reviews.comment:
Tendrían que mejorar y priorizar el aseo de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
They would have to improve and prioritize the cleanliness of the bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtazRxTm13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Gracias por mantener así los baños!

(Translated by Google)
Thank you for keeping the restrooms like this!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdzRQR0R3EAE

reviews.comment:
Local no tan concurrido de la marca. Aún sin ser socio de Automóvil club argentino, te atienden (obviamente no te hacen el descuento de socios) sin problemas y se evitan las largas colas correspondientes a otros locales muy concurridos.

(Translated by Google)
This isn't a particularly busy location for the brand. Even if you're not a member of the Argentine Automobile Club, they'll serve you without any problems (obviously they don't give you the member discount), and you avoid the long lines at other, more crowded locations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtbmViNmh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene un espacio agradable para que las mascotas puedan jugar antes de llegar a destino. Los baños sucios como siempre

(Translated by Google)
It has a nice space for pets to play before arriving at their destination. The bathrooms are dirty as usual.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtOWFpYTB3RRAB
